text.title: finops-devops-cost-commitments Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for finops-devops-cost-commitments as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Running stateful services (PostgreSQL, Redis, Kafka) on Spot instances without a promotion-to-On-Demand fallback.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: 2-minute termination notice is insufficient for graceful database shutdown and data flush to storage. Use On-Demand or Reserved for stateful services; Spot only for stateless or checkpointed workloads.

failure-mode.description: Using a single Spot pool (one instance type, one AZ) for a Spot fleet.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: When the provider reclaims that pool, 100% of the fleet is interrupted simultaneously. Diversify across 3+ instance types and 2+ AZs to reduce fleet-wide interruption probability below 1%.
